# Third-Party Source

This directory contains vendored third-party material used by RunHaven.

- `zork1/`: the MIT-licensed Zork I source collection from
  `historicalsource/zork1`, used only by the hidden TUI easter egg.

License attribution and vendored revisions are recorded in
`../THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md`.

Historical source formatting is kept close to upstream; `.gitattributes`
disables whitespace checks for `third_party/zork1/**`.
